faq.title: Where can I purchase courses?
faq.text: Here are three ways to purchase your courses:
list: Click the "Try it now" button above to purchase your Trial Lessons;
Purchase courses on the official website;
Download the "Creta Class" app and purchase your desired courses in the app.
